subparts.text: Discuss various key factors responsible for the accurate power estimation in the design cycle.
What is meant by logic simulation?
What is the impact of HVLs on simulation?
What is RTL hardware design flow and methodology?
What are different benefits of using Transactional-Level Models in a SoC Design Flow?
What is the difference between in circuit debugger and in circuit emulator?
Among In-Circuit Emulators and JTAG Debuggers which method is better suited for different scenarios? Justify with examples.

questions.question_text: Discuss the challenges that FPGAs create for Board Design.
Draw and explain the architecture of FPGA. Differentiate between semicustom and full custom design
What is the primary difference between event oriented and process- oriented simulation? Give Example.
Write a Verilog Program for implementation and verification of a 8-bit shift register Circuit.
Discuss design flow of a TLM Modeling application. How the TLM can be used to evaluate the system level design decisions.
Explain how TLMs can be automatically generated from a given mapping of the application to a multimedia platform if no initial mapping is available.
Discuss how the hardware emulators are capable of exchanging events with the software simulators. What different considerations are required for successful Emulation?
Draw and explain the overview of Emulator Architecture design.
